integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is clicking and typing within the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the actual marketing fields were used to store the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'Summer 2025 Promotion', 'Email', and 'Newsletter' are entered into their respective dedicated dropdown/input fields (Campaign, Medium, Source), rather than being typed into the general description, internal notes, or chatter.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the records in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Odoo 'Save' action being completed or the form reflecting the saved state with the new values, rather than just typing the answers into a separate text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating three specific Odoo CRM opportunities: 'Fleet Management Software - Logistics Inc', 'Inventory Control System - Warehouse Co', and 'ERP Implementation - Manufacturing Ltd'. For each, the following exact values must be set: Campaign = 'Summer 2025 Promotion', Medium = 'Email', and Source = 'Newsletter'. In Odoo CRM, these fields are typically located under the 'Extra Info' tab of the opportunity form view.
